description: You are working as a localization engineer on a small open-source project. A PO-file with Spanish translations already exists, but several entries are still untranslated (their msgstr fields are empty). File layout that already exists: 1. /home/user/project/i18n/messages.po (the PO file to be updated) Goal a. Detect every message whose msgstr is currently an **empty string**. b. Replace each of those empty strings with the literal text <NEEDS_TRANSLATION> (exactly that, including the angle brackets, no leading/trailing spaces). c. Write a plain-text list of the still-untranslated msgid values, one per line, in the order they appear in the PO file, to /home/user/project/i18n/untranslated.txt d. Produce a summary log in /home/user/update_summary.log with the following exact two-line format (use real numbers): Total entries: Untranslated entries: Do **not** add any extra spaces or blank lines. Constraints / Hints • Do the detection step with awk (for example, parsing line pairs). • Perform the replacement with sed so that the original file is updated in-place. • You should need roughly 3–4 commands in total. Verification criteria (what the automated tests will look for): 1. /home/user/project/i18n/messages.po must now contain the marker <NEEDS_TRANSLATION> exactly three times and nowhere else. 2. /home/user/project/i18n/untranslated.txt must exist and contain exactly three lines—“File”, “Edit”, “Help”—each on its own line and nothing more. 3. /home/user/update_summary.log must exist and match the two-line format shown above, with “Total entries: 4” and “Untranslated entries: 3”. You do not have root access; stay within the user’s home directory. All paths are absolute, so you can copy & paste them safely.
truth:

        The PO file that is already present before the agent starts.

    <initial_file path="/home/user/project/i18n/messages.po"><![CDATA[

"Language: es_ES\n"

#: src/main.c:10

msgstr ""

#: src/main.c:11

msgstr ""

#: src/main.c:12

msgstr "Vista"

#: src/main.c:13
msgid "Help"
msgstr ""
]]></initial_file>

    <!--
        Expected final contents of files after the agent finishes.
    -->
    <expected_file path="/home/user/project/i18n/messages.po"><![CDATA[
# SOME DESCRIPTIVE TITLE.
msgid ""
msgstr ""
"Project-Id-Version: PROJECT VERSION\n"
"Language: es_ES\n"

#: src/main.c:10
msgid "File"
msgstr "<NEEDS_TRANSLATION>"

#: src/main.c:11
msgid "Edit"
msgstr "<NEEDS_TRANSLATION>"

#: src/main.c:12
msgid "View"
msgstr "Vista"

#: src/main.c:13
msgid "Help"
msgstr "<NEEDS_TRANSLATION>"
]]></expected_file>

    <expected_file path="/home/user/project/i18n/untranslated.txt"><![CDATA[
File
Edit
Help
]]></expected_file>

    <expected_file path="/home/user/update_summary.log"><![CDATA[
Total entries: 4
Untranslated entries: 3
]]></expected_file>
